sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80718" key="pentaprwtei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεντα-πρωτεία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n80718.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">board of the first five men</tr_>, Lat. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quinqueprimi,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.28.2.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
